title: Dynamic query with conditional join
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.search/1` that accepts optional `:category_name` and `:author_name` filters. If `:category_name` is present, `inner_join: c in assoc(p, :category)` and filter `c.name`. If `:author_name` is present, `inner_join: u in assoc(p, :author)` and filter `u.name`. If neither, no join. Start with a base query, conditionally add joins, and use dynamic filters. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Requires conditional joins (not just filters), which is the hardest dynamic pattern — the query structure itself varies.
